title: SC2Tools User Profile
description: Per-user identity. One record per installation. Read by the React SPA at boot and by the wizard on first run.

version.description: Schema version. Bump only on breaking changes; migrations live in routes/settings.js.

region.description: Battle.net region. SC2Pulse regions: us=1, eu=2, kr=3, cn=5, sea=6.

mmr_target.description: Optional MMR goal for progress widgets. Null when unset.

preferred_player_name_in_replays.description: In-game player name as it appears in replay player slots. Used to disambiguate when account hosts multiple alts.

races.description: Races the user regularly plays. Single-race users pick one; Random or off-race players check multiple. Drives default perspective filters and per-race breakdowns.
